sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n6889" key="a)nale/kths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνα-λέκτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, Lat. <sense id="n6889.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">-lecta, slave who picked up broken meats,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Mart.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
